description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after the iconic cartoon character Mickey Mouse. The toy features large, round black ears, a white face with black oval eyes and nose, and a small smiling mouth. Its body is black with a pair of red shorts, accented by two white buttons, and it has yellow shoes on its feet. The arms are white, mimicking gloves, and the toy's proportions are exaggerated with oversized head and feet, typical of cartoonish plush toys. The surface appears textured and slightly rough, suggesting a hand-crafted or well-loved appearance. This toy would likely be found in urban environments such as parks, playgrounds, or as a lost item on a sidewalk.
description: A plush Mickey Mouse stuffed toy with large black ears, red shorts, white gloves, and yellow shoes, featuring a textured, slightly rough surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, large black ears, white gloves, red shorts, and yellow shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, one ear, and the side of the red shorts and yellow shoe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both ears, red shorts, and yellow shoes, with the small tail visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, nose, and the side of the red shorts and yellow shoe.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with wide oval eyes and a small, subtle smile. The eyebrows are not prominent, giving a neutral but welcoming appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent and extended forward, legs apart, and head facing forward.
